proHero.title: Evolve Pro · $9.99/mo
proHero.body: Free forever: basic workout logging, exploring EvoFit, and basic stats. Pro unlocks tracking, plans, scanners, analytics, and more.

basicLogging.title: Basic workout logging
basicLogging.desc: Type, duration, and distance — free for everyone.

plans.title: Personalized Training Plans
plans.desc: Plans matched to your goals and schedule.

macros.title: Calorie & Macro Tracker
macros.desc: Daily calories, protein, carbs, and fat.

scanner.title: AI Food Scanner
scanner.desc: Barcode and photo scan for fast logging.

history.title: Training History Analysis
history.desc: Break down past sessions and effort.

library.title: Saved Workouts Library
library.desc: Your bookmarked sessions in one place.

meals.title: Meal Planning
meals.desc: Weekly meal schedule, restaurant swaps, and macro targets.

recipes.title: Pro Recipe Database
recipes.desc: Cook-at-home recipes with ingredients, steps, and portions.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics & Graphs
analytics.desc: Trends, volume charts, and deeper insights.

body.title: Body Transformation Tracker
body.desc: Photos, measurements, and change over time.

health.title: Health Integrations
health.desc: Apple Health and Garmin Connect sync.

support.title: Priority Support
support.desc: Faster help when you need it.

forums.title: Athlete Network
forums.desc: Find and follow athletes on Evolve.
